name: tng-rise
description: TNG Rise: AI CFO agent for Malaysian micro F&B merchants. Hackathon project.

scripts.dev:full: concurrently --names 'mock,orch,web,browser' --prefix-colors 'yellow,green,cyan,magenta' --kill-others-on-fail 'npm:dev:mock-tng' 'npm:dev:orchestrator' 'npm:dev:web' 'cd services/browser-agent && uv run python -m src.server'
scripts.dev:browser-agent: cd services/browser-agent && uv run python -m src.server
